name: Chess Visualized
short_description: A playable Chess board that visualizes where each piece can go and what every move does
detailed_description:
Are you a new player that doesn't know how each piece moves? Have you ever made a move, not realizing you have left an important piece wide open for attack? Have you ever missed opportunities to checkmate your opponent? With this version of Chess, you can easily survey every move possible and what effects it will have. The game will not provide strategy recommendations, but will instead give you the ability to survey and judge every possible move for yourself.

To report bugs or request changes, go to the ChessVisualized-Info repository on GitHub.

Known bugs:

  • Stockfish bot appears to not work on ARM processors.

  • Stockfish may crash the first time you use it. If retrying doesn't work, try posting an issue in the GitHub repository.
